loop.ariaLabel: Supported academic sources and citation formats

features.heading: Everything your research needs
features.subheading: Multi-source search, instant citations, semantic highlighting and an AI reading assistant — all in one place.

multiSource.title: Multi-source search
multiSource.desc: CrossRef, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex and arXiv simultaneously with relevance scoring.

formats.title: 7 citation formats
formats.desc: APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, IEEE, Vancouver and BibTeX generated instantly.

highlight.title: Semantic highlighting
highlight.desc: 5 colors with academic meaning: key citations, evidence, insights, questions and more.

assistant.title: AI Reading Assistant
assistant.desc: Multi-turn conversation about the paper. Suggested questions, history and Trust Cards.

pdf.title: Full PDF
pdf.desc: Upload the PDF and highlight any section of the full text, not just the abstract.

export.title: Flexible export
export.desc: Export your notes as Markdown, structured JSON or a table for Notion.

search.title: Search or upload your paper
search.desc: Enter a DOI, URL, title or upload a PDF from your device.

select.title: Pick the result
select.desc: Choose from multiple sources with smart relevance scoring.

cite.title: Cite, highlight and ask
cite.desc: Generate the citation, highlight passages and chat with the AI about the paper.

export.title: Export your notes
export.desc: Markdown, JSON or a Notion table in one click. Everything organized.

ai.heading: Chat with your paper
ai.subheading: Select any passage, ask the AI and get contextual answers. Multi-turn conversation, suggested questions and transparent attribution.
ai.perkTrust: Trust Card: based only on what you read
ai.perkPdf: Works on the abstract and the full PDF
ai.demoAnswerPre: Zero-shot means the model can segment objects it
ai.demoAnswerPost: . SAM was trained with a flexible prompt that lets it generalize without specific examples for each category.
ai.demoChip1: How does it compare to CLIP?

formatsSection.heading: The 7 academic standards
formatsSection.subheading: Generated instantly with direct copy to clipboard.

apa.sample: Author, A. A. (2024). Title. Journal Name, 5(2), 12–25.

mla.sample: Author, Name. "Title." Journal Name, vol. 5, 2024, pp. 12–25.

harvard.sample: Author, A. A. (2024) 'Title', Journal Name, 5(2), pp. 12–25.

ieee.sample: [1] A. Author, "Title," Journal, vol. 5, no. 2, pp. 12–25, 2024.

cta.sub: No subscription. No extensions. No hassle.
cta.trust: No credit card · No installation · Instant access

footer.tagline: Search, read and cite academic papers in seconds. No card required.
